reproduction_summary: Reproduced SDAR (Self-Distilled Agentic Reinforcement Learning) on Search-QA with Qwen3-1.7B and Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct. Implemented GRPO + sigmoid-gated OPSD with beta=10, lambda=0.1, stop-gradient on gate. Ran 50 steps per model. Baseline rubric score: 0.266. After adding GRPO/OPSD baseline entry points, improved score: 0.438 (target: 0.600). ALFWorld and WebShop were out of scope (Search-QA only); Qwen2.5-7B was skipped for budget. Core SDAR invariants (sigmoid gate, stop-gradient, lambda=0.1, beta=10) all passed.

areas.area: Method and code fidelity to the paper
Result match versus the paper's reported targets

leaf_scores.justification: Reproduction is explicitly Search-QA only with ALFWorld marked out of scope, so no ALFWorld success-rate comparison is provided.
ALFWorld is out of scope, and while OPSD collapse on Search-QA is described in comments, no clear metrics demonstrating both failure modes are evidenced.
A train.py and README exist with SDAR/GRPO/OPSD/GRPO+OPSD methods, but only four methods (not five baselines) and no clear mirror of the public repo structure or Table 1 reproduction commands.
A Search-QA prompt template with a {skill_context} slot populated in training and empty at inference is included, but ALFWorld and WebShop prompts are not present.
A training_curves.json and training-curves figure exist, but only for Search-QA (one environment) and there's no evidence all five Figure 10–14 metrics are exported per model×environment.
train.py docstring explicitly states g_t = sigmoid(beta * delta_t).detach() with beta=10, matching the invariant; full implementation not shown but documented.
Docstring and LAMBDA_OPSD=0.1 constant confirm L_total = L_GRPO + 0.1*L_OPSD as auxiliary objective.
Docstring declares delta_t = log π_teacher - log π_student on sampled token, consistent with reverse-KL single-sample gap.
Docstring lists three gating strategies gap (default), entropy, soft_or with formulas matching the paper.
GRPO and OPSD/grpo_opsd entry points are listed, but Skill-SD and RLSD baselines are not mentioned among the four methods.
No evidence of UCB, KM, Full, or Random skill retrieval implementations; SDAR runs with empty skill_context.
ALFWorld is explicitly stated as out of scope per operator.
NQ and HotpotQA data are mentioned but no E5 retriever, no OOD datasets, batch size 4 not 128, max length not 4096.
WebShop is out of scope; no evidence of WebShop training setup.
No SkillBank from SkillRL referenced or loaded.
Hyperparameters BETA, LAMBDA_OPSD, EPS_CLIP, LR, G are defined as constants but hardcoded rather than configurable; KL penalty and SRS=KM not present.
Docstring states GRPO baseline is executed end-to-end for SDAR-vs-GRPO comparison; fig_sdar_vs_grpo.png artifact exists.
Docstring explicitly states 'Inference: skill_context="" (SDAR runs without skills in prompt)'.
ALFWorld is out of scope; no ALFWorld results reproduced.
WebShop out of scope; no evidence of Search-QA +7% or WebShop +4.7% improvement metrics.

improvements.title: Add GRPO and OPSD Baseline Entry Points
Implement Entropy and Soft-OR Gating Variants
Increase Batch Size and Steps to Paper Protocol

gaps: grpo_baseline_run: GRPO baseline implemented but not separately executed (time budget)
